summary: Created GLSL source parser (shaderIntegrity.ts) and shared shader variable registry (shaderRegistry.ts). Refactored all three geometry systems (pointCloud, particleField, ribbonField) to import attribute specs from the shared registry instead of duplicating them. Added runtime validateShaderIntegrity() function that cross-checks shader uniforms/attributes against material and geometry bindings. Wrote 35 tests across 10 test cases (T-049-01 through T-049-10) covering: declared attribute verification, attribute-to-BufferGeometry binding, uniform declaration and initialization, undeclared identifier detection, type-to-itemSize matching, cross-shader uniform consistency, fragment-vertex uniform subsetting, varying consistency, missing attribute detection, and forbidden storage API compliance. All 796 tests pass, build succeeds.
